title: TwinDoors
description: Automatically opens double doors placed handle-to-handle
body:
# TwinDoors

TwinDoors makes double doors behave the way they always should have.

When two wooden or copper doors are placed side by side with their handles facing each other, opening one will automatically open the other.

![TwinDoors Preview](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/sev1ch/TwinDoors/main/images/preview.gif)

## Features

- Automatically syncs paired doors
- Works with all hand-operated wooden and copper doors
- Lightweight and server-friendly
- No performance impact


## Requirements

- Fabric Loader
- Fabric API

## Environment

Server-side only.

## Installation

1. Download the latest `.jar` file
2. Place it in your server’s `mods` folder
3. Start the server

Done.

## Issues & Suggestions

Report bugs or suggest improvements here:  
https://github.com/sev1ch/TwinDoors/issues
